name: python-libnuml
documentation: libNuML is a library for reading, writing and manipulating NuML.  It is written in ISO C and C++, supports NuML Level 1, Version 1, and runs on Linux, Microsoft Windows, and Apple MacOS X.  For more information about SEDML, please see http://github.com/numl/numl/.

modules.name: setup

classes.name: setup.CMakeExtension

methods.name: setup.CMakeExtension.__init__
documentation: Initialize by passing on arguments.
Override the default setuptools extension building.

classes.name: setup.CMakeBuild

methods.name: setup.CMakeBuild.run
documentation:
Call Cmake and build every extension.

Overrides parent's method.

methods.name: setup.CMakeBuild.build_cmake
documentation: Configure `extension` with CMake and build modules.
Override `build_ext` to then register it in the command classes.
